prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `4ff4c9da`.
codex_response:
Implemented `4ff4c9da` as a separator-lattice tile task: the verifier collects normalized `8` seed shapes tile-by-tile, then paints `8`s onto any tile whose accent-color cells have the same normalized shape while preserving that tile’s own local placement. The `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint was broadly consistent and I used it as a coarse starting point; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry, so no `notes.md` was needed. No new primitive was added.

Verification is complete: official examples passed `4/4`, the shared builder produced 1000 examples, `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 4ff4c9da` passed `1000/1000`, and I visually checked `[preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/4ff4c9da/previews/preview_01.png)`.
